description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs using the debian Docker image and the docker tag runner. In the test stage add a test-bootstrap job that runs only on the master branch and executes the exact commands: rm -rf * || true, rm -rf .* || true, apt-get update && apt-get install --yes curl git grep, and curl https://gitlab.com/datenstrom/home/raw/master/.local/bin/bootstrap | bash. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs mkdir -p public and cp .local/bin/bootstrap public/, then publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Both jobs are tagged with docker and no caches are defined.
